goal_title_suggestions: Follow a Real Program and Grow

variants: Track your workouts. Download Hevy or Strong.
Start logging. Install Hevy or Strong from the App Store.
Get the app. Pick Hevy or Strong and download it now.
tasks.why: You need a place to log before you can build anything.

variants: Log your weight. Step on the scale and save the number.
Find your baseline. Weigh yourself and write it down.
Start the record. Step on the scale and note the number.
tasks.why: Your starting weight is the only way to measure real progress.

variants: Take a progress photo. Front-facing. Save it in Photos.
Snap your before shot. Stand straight, front view, save it.
Get the baseline photo. Take one now and keep it private.
tasks.why: A before photo is the best proof of how far you'll come.

variants: Set up your app. Create a free account in Hevy or Strong.
Finish the setup. Open your workout app and sign up.
Build your profile. Complete the setup in your workout app.
tasks.why: A quick setup today means you're ready to log your first workout.

variants: Plan your week. Pick 3 days to work out and write them down.
Choose your days. Mon, Wed, Fri works — just pick 3 and note them.
Lock in 3 days. Write down which days you'll work out this week.
tasks.why: Picking your days now means you won't skip when life gets busy.

variants: Set a reminder. Add a phone alarm for your first workout day.
Block the time. Put a calendar alert on your first workout.
Make it stick. Set an alarm for your first workout this week.
tasks.why: A reminder makes it harder to forget.

variants: Start the day. Do 10 pushups on your floor.
First workout. Get down and do 10 pushups right now.
Try it now. Do 10 pushups — drop to your knees if needed.
tasks.why: Your first workout starts with one simple move.

variants: Build your legs. Do 20 bodyweight squats.
Work the legs. Stand up and do 20 squats right now.
Leg day basics. Do 20 squats — no weight needed.
tasks.why: Squats work your whole lower body with zero equipment.

variants: Log it now. Open your app and record today's pushups and squats.
Save the work. Type your reps into Hevy or Strong.
Track the session. Log what you just did in your workout app.
tasks.why: Logging your first session builds the habit of tracking.

variants: Eat more protein. Have a second chicken breast today.
Boost protein. Add eggs or Greek yogurt to your next meal.
Protein basics. Have a shake or some cottage cheese today.
tasks.why: More protein means your muscles can actually grow.

variants: Hold a plank. Get on the floor and hold it for 30 seconds.
Core today. Drop to a plank and hold for 30 seconds.
Build your core. Hold a plank position for 30 seconds.
tasks.why: A strong core makes every other exercise easier.

variants: Rest smart. Drink a full glass of water before bed tonight.
Recover well. Have a big glass of water before you sleep.
Hydrate now. Drink a full glass of water in the next 5 minutes.
tasks.why: Water helps your muscles recover while you sleep.

variants: Push again. Do 12 pushups — 2 more than day 3.
Beat last time. Do 12 pushups right now.
More reps today. Get on the floor and do 12 pushups.
tasks.why: Adding 2 reps each session is how you get stronger.

variants: Work your arms. Do 10 tricep dips off a chair or step.
Try dips. Use a chair and do 10 tricep dips.
Build your arms. Do 10 dips off the edge of your couch or chair.
tasks.why: Dips work your arms and chest at the same time.

variants: Log it now. Save your reps in Hevy or Strong.
Track it fast. Open your app and log today's session.
Record the work. Add today's dips and pushups to your app.
tasks.why: Logging keeps you honest and shows you how far you've come.

variants: Review your week. Count how many workouts you finished.
Check your streak. Look at how many sessions you logged.
Week one check. Open your app and count your completed workouts.
tasks.why: Reviewing what you did keeps you motivated to keep going.

variants: Stretch it out. Hold each leg in a standing hamstring stretch for 20 seconds.
Loosen up. Do a simple hamstring stretch on each side for 20 seconds.
Rest day stretch. Stretch your legs and hold each side for 20 seconds.
tasks.why: Stretching on rest days keeps you loose and ready for next session.

variants: Eat more protein. Add eggs or chicken to today's biggest meal.
Protein reminder. Have Greek yogurt or a shake with your next meal.
Keep it up. Pick one high-protein food and add it to lunch or dinner.
tasks.why: Your muscles need protein every day, not just on workout days.

variants: Log your weight. Step on the scale and write it down.
Weekly weigh-in. Step on the scale and save the number.
Track the number. Weigh yourself and record it today.
tasks.why: Checking once a week shows real trends without daily noise.

variants: Plan next week. Write down your 3 workout days.
Schedule it. Pick 3 days next week and block them off.
Set it up. Choose which 3 days you'll work out next week.
tasks.why: Planning ahead makes showing up feel automatic.

variants: Rest and walk. Go outside for a 10-minute walk.
Active rest. Take a short walk around the block today.
Move easy. Walk for 10 minutes — no rush.
tasks.why: Light movement on rest days helps your body recover faster.

variants: Push it. Do 3 sets of 10 pushups with a 30-second rest between.
Level up. Do 10 pushups, rest 30 seconds, repeat 3 times.
Build endurance. Do 3 rounds of 10 pushups today.
tasks.why: Three sets builds more strength than one set at a time.

variants: Squat more. Do 3 sets of 15 bodyweight squats.
Leg session. Do 15 squats, rest 30 seconds, repeat 3 times.
Work the legs. Do 3 rounds of 15 squats today.
tasks.why: More sets mean more work for your legs to grow.

variants: Log everything. Save all 3 sets in your app right now.
Track it all. Open Hevy or Strong and log each set.
Record the work. Add your sets and reps to your workout app.
tasks.why: Tracking sets helps you see if you're actually getting stronger.

variants: Eat more protein. Have two eggs or a scoop of protein today.
Protein today. Add a hard-boiled egg to your snack.
Hit your protein. Have chicken, eggs, or Greek yogurt at your next meal.
tasks.why: Eating protein on rest days helps your muscles repair overnight.

variants: Hold a plank. Get on the floor and hold for 40 seconds.
Core work. Do a plank and hold for 40 seconds.
Plank today. Hold a plank for 40 seconds — 10 more than last time.
tasks.why: Adding 10 seconds each time is how your core gets stronger.

variants: Sleep better. Put your phone down 20 minutes before bed.
Rest well. Set a phone-down alarm 20 minutes before sleep.
Recover tonight. Avoid screens for 20 minutes before bed.
tasks.why: Better sleep means faster muscle recovery.

variants: Push harder. Do 3 sets of 12 pushups today.
More reps. Do 12 pushups per set, 3 sets total.
Step it up. Do 3 rounds of 12 pushups with a 30-second rest.
tasks.why: Two more reps per set is steady, real progress.

variants: Work your back. Do 10 Superman holds on the floor.
Back exercise. Lie face down and lift your arms and legs 10 times.
Back basics. Do 10 Superman lifts — lie down and raise arms and legs.
tasks.why: A strong back prevents injury and helps every other lift.

variants: Log it. Open your app and save today's pushups and Supermans.
Track the session. Record your sets in Hevy or Strong.
Save your work. Log reps and sets in your workout app now.
tasks.why: Tracking gives you proof that you showed up.

variants: Check your food. Look at what you ate yesterday and find the protein.
Food audit. Pick one meal from yesterday — did it have protein in it?

variants: Stretch your chest. Hold a doorframe stretch for 30 seconds each side.
Open your chest. Stand in a doorway and gently stretch for 30 seconds.

variants: Drink more water. Fill a large bottle and drink it today.
Hydrate today. Have 3 full glasses of water before dinner.
Water goal. Drink one full water bottle today.

variants: Full session. Do 3 sets of 12 pushups and 3 sets of 15 squats.

variants: Add lunges. Do 10 walking lunges on each leg.

variants: Log the full session. Save all sets and exercises in your app.
Track everything. Open Hevy or Strong and record today's full workout.

variants: Rest well. Do a 5-minute full-body stretch on the floor.

tasks.why: Rest and stretching are when your muscles actually grow.

variants: Eat more protein. Have chicken or eggs with your biggest meal today.
Protein focus. Add Greek yogurt or a shake to your day.
Fuel recovery. Pick one meal today and double the protein in it.

variants: Review your week. Count workouts done vs. planned.
Check your progress. Look at how many sessions you logged this week.
Week review. Open your app and see how many workouts you completed.
